CONTENT.Honours: IndividualSerbian SuperLiga Player of the Week: 2023–24 (Round 10), (Round 27)
CONTENT.Club career: At the end of March 2021, Ivanović signed his first professional contract with Vojvodina. On 22 May 2022, Ivanović made his first-team debut, replacing Veljko Simić in the 90th minute in a 0:2 away win against TSC Bačka Topola.On 8 August 2022, Ivanović joined Serie A side Sampodria on a season-long loan, with the option to buy.After Sampodria failed to activate the option to buy Ivanović, he returned from loan and signed a new three-year deal with the club. On 18 April 2024, Ivanović signed an extension to the existing contract, keeping him at the club until June 2027.
CONTENT.External links: Mihailo Ivanović at SoccerwayMihailo Ivanović at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Ivanović was called-up in the Serbia U-17 team during 2020, and played two friendly games. After that, he was member of a national U18 team.

SUMMARY: Mihailo Ivanović (Serbian Cyrillic: Михаило Ивановић; born 29 November 2004) is a Serbian professional footballer who plays as a centre-forward for Serbian SuperLiga club Vojvodina.
